creator: arved@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: arved->python

Sorry forgot about this PR. 

The reason why this port needs a python without threads is explained in 
the Thread "Threaded python on FreeBSD" here: 
http://search.postgresql.org/search?m=1&q=freebsd+python+threads&l=&d=&s=date 

AFAIK there is currently no way to explicitly depend on a non-threaded python 
port. 

Over to the python Maintainer group. Maybe they have some ideas, or can create 
a python-withoutthreads slaveport.
